topic.title: 프로젝트 현황 발표
topic.description: 프로젝트의 현재 진행 상황과 향후 계획을 간단하고 명확하게 발표하는 방법을 배웁니다.

korean_scripts.korean_text: 다음 주에 프로젝트 현황을 발표해야 해요.
현재까지 진행된 작업과 앞으로 할 일을 중심으로 설명해야 해요.
10분 정도입니다. 간단하고 명확하게 전달하는 것이 중요해요.

foreign_scripts.foreign_text: I need to present the project status next week.
foreign_scripts.chunked_text: I need to present the project status next week. | Yes, | what should we include? | We should explain | the work done so far | and the tasks ahead. | How much time do we have | for the presentation? | About 10 minutes. | It's important | to convey it simply and clearly. | Okay. | I can help prepare the slides.

foreign_scripts.foreign_text: We should explain the work done so far and the tasks ahead.
foreign_scripts.chunked_text: We should explain the work done so far and the tasks ahead.

foreign_scripts.foreign_text: How much time do we have for the presentation?
foreign_scripts.chunked_text: How much time do we have for the presentation?

foreign_scripts.foreign_text: About 10 minutes. It's important to convey it simply and clearly.
foreign_scripts.chunked_text: About 10 minutes. It's important to convey it simply and clearly.

foreign_scripts.foreign_text: Okay. I can help prepare the slides.
foreign_scripts.chunked_text: Okay. I can help prepare the slides.
